title: Alternate Cave Dweller
description: My take on the caved weller from the cave dweller mod
body:
In my head the cave noises in Minecraft were made by sculk shriekers, so when I saw the Cave Dweller mod in [Gargin's YouTube video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ntxl3lzrTRw) I wanted to make my own version of the model.

Requires the [Cave Dweller Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller) or Cave Dweller Evolved Mod [(Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-evolved)/[(Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-evolved-(fabric)). If you use the Evolved mod then you have to use the resource pack that matches.

### If you use this resource pack in a YouTube video or anything like that - please leave a link to this resource pack in the description :)

### Now available as a [VR Chat Avatar](https://vrchat.com/home/avatar/avtr_ace7fdba-a651-4219-822b-79d273d38432)

## Content from this resource pack is not permitted to be used alongside any AI product / service


![creepy render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H3e3HAxd/images/afaeb45f9d85fdb6589723c4eef13429b4cc68e6.png)

![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H3e3HAxd/images/da2fa8089f1ae1a40d36bd9a08b216fb56883107.png)
